_meta.notes: Book II, Chapter 2 — A Door That Wasn't There.

title: A Door That Wasn't There
theme: old passages re-open; the map of the world is one room larger
worldEvent: a stone door appears in the side of the collapsed-tunnel that was not there in Year 0
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK II, CHAPTER 2: A DOOR THAT WASN'T THERE. A door has appeared in the collapsed-tunnel that was not there before — older than the rock around it. The walls remember it; the air does not. If the player is in collapsed-tunnel, reference the door; otherwise, reference dust drifting somewhere it shouldn't.
